paper.title_en: The Role of the Volume in Black Hole Thermodynamics
paper.abstract_en: Gibbons et al. [arXiv:hep-th/0408217] found the energy $E$ of Kerr--anti-de Sitter black holes by integrating the first law of black hole thermodynamics. They found that $E$ corresponds to the Ashtekar--Magnon--Das (AMD) energy associated with an asymptotically nonrotating frame, whereas the AMD ``energy'' which I will call $F$ associated with an asymptotically rotating frame does not satisfy the first law. In Cvetič et al. [arXiv:1012.2888], the first law was extended by interpreting $E$ as an enthalpy and $Λ$ as being proportional to a pressure. The term conjugate to the pressure was then interpreted as the ``thermodynamic volume'' $V_{th}$. Associated with the first law (with varying pressure) is a Smarr relation for $E$. The Smarr relation for $F$ also exists, and the term conjugate to the pressure in that Smarr relation is the ``geometric volume'' $V_{geo}$, shown in [arXiv:1310.1935] to be equal to the vector volume $V_C$ of the black hole. To address why it is necessary to use $E$ rather than $F$ to have a viable first law but $V_C$ appears naturally in the Smarr relation associated with $F$ rather than $E$, I adapt Barnich and Compère [arXiv:gr-qc/0412029], by defining a conserved quantity $H^I_χ$ associated with Killing vector $χ$. $E$ and $F$ are given by $H^I_ξ$ and $H^I_β$ respectively where $ξ$ is asymptotically hypersurface-orthogonal and $β$ is proportional to the divergence of the Principal Conformal Killing--Yano tensor $\boldsymbol{h}$. I show that the first law will be satisfied by $H^I_χ$ if both $χ^a$ and the background anti-de Sitter metric have unvarying components, which holds for $ξ^a$ but not $β^a$, explaining why the first law works for $E$ but not $F$. I show that $V_C$ appears in the $β$-associated Smarr relation due to simplifications related to $\boldsymbol{h}$.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文深入探讨了黑洞热力学中体积的作用，解释了第一定律和Smarr关系中的能量选择问题，理论深度高，方法严谨，且包含新颖的见解。
decision.title_zh: 体积在黑洞热力学中的作用
decision.abstract_zh: Gibbons等人[arXiv:hep-th/0408217]通过积分黑洞热力学第一定律找到了Kerr-反de Sitter黑洞的能量E。他们发现，E对应于渐近非旋转坐标系下的Ashtekar-Magnon-Das (AMD)能量，而渐近旋转坐标系下的AMD“能量”（我称之为F）不满足第一定律。在Cvetič等人[arXiv:1012.2888]中，第一定律被扩展，将E解释为焓，Λ解释为与压力成正比。与压力共轭的项被解释为“热力学体积”Vth。与（变压力）第一定律相关联的是E的Smarr关系。F的Smarr关系也存在，在该Smarr关系中与压力共轭的项是“几何体积”Vgeo，文献[arXiv:1310.1935]表明其等于黑洞的矢量体积VC。为了解决为什么必须使用E而不是F才能得到可行的第一定律，但VC自然地出现在与F而不是E相关的Smarr关系中，我参考了Barnich和Compère [arXiv:gr-qc/0412029]，定义了与Killing矢量χ相关的守恒量H^I_χ。E和F分别由H^I_ξ和H^I_β给出，其中ξ是渐近超曲面正交的，β与主共形Killing-Yano张量h的散度成正比。我证明，如果χ^a和背景反de Sitter度规都具有不变的分量，则H^I_χ满足第一定律，这对ξ^a成立但对β^a不成立，这解释了为什么第一定律对E成立但对F不成立。我证明，由于与h相关的简化，VC出现在与β相关的Smarr关系中。
